programme.title: E14
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E232 - Ice Skating
programme.desc: Peppa and George are going ice-skating for the first time. Mummy Pig teaches Peppa to skate and soon she is having lots of fun. Peppa begins to teach George how to skate but it turns out he is a natural born skater. Peppa and George love ice-skating.

programme.title: E112 - Costume Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile dresses as Super Crocodile for his first Halloween, and tries to live up to his new identity.

programme.desc: Young Francois witnesses the birth of Barbapapa. // Barbapapa is a prisoner in a zoo.

programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile dresses as Super Crocodile for his first Halloween, and tries to live up to his new identity.

programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure.

programme.title: E749 - Grampy Rabbit's Hovercraft
programme.desc: Grampy Rabbit saves the day when Grandpa Pig's boat sinks and drives everyone around on his Hovercraft!

programme.title: E905 - The Great Bedtime Race
programme.desc: It's nighttime in Axle City, and Blaze and AJ stumble upon the race of their dreams: the Great Bedtime Race! But Crusher is also in the race and he won't rest until he wins. Will Blaze come out on top, or will Crusher take home the Nightlight Trophy?

programme.title: E312 - Abuela's Quinceanera / Story Time
programme.desc: Dora finds out that her Abuela never had a quinceańera and throws her a super-secret surprise party with a special dress, tiara, and shoes! // Dora's friend Coco doesn't have a story for Story Time, so they go to the Tall Tale Tree in search of one!

programme.title: E410 - Robots In Space
programme.desc: When Space Commander Megan is marooned on Pluto, our robot heroes will race through wormholes, shoot past ice volcanoes, and blast straight through an asteroid field to bring their new friend back home.

programme.desc: Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie.

programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are going camping with Madame Gazelle. When it gets dark, they all sing a song around the campfire. When it is time for bed, Peppa and her friends get a little scared and all the children end up sleeping in Madame Gazelle's tent

programme.title: Pacific North West
programme.desc: Explored Seattle: Pike Place Market (est. 1907), IFly's indoor wind tunnel, and Museum of Flight Aviation with a thrilling jet simulator ride. A day filled with history, adventure, and aviation excitement!

programme.title: Mind Mess
programme.desc: Something's wrong-Motor is meowing! Carol and Robbie find he's swapped brains with a cat in a lab experiment gone right... but now he can't switch back! As they try to fix it, chaos erupts: Robbie ends up in Carol's body, Carol in Robbie's, and Motor's still a cat!

programme.title: Crunchy Crystals
programme.desc: Eric learns that although it can take millions of years to make one crystal, he can make some in just a week with an easy experiment. His new crystals taste good, too.

programme.title: Journey Back to the Moon
programme.desc: NASA is planning to not only send humans back to the moon, but also create a permanent residence on the lunar surface. Host Emily Calandrelli explores the different aspects of this historic mission.

programme.title: Crunchy Crystals
programme.desc: Eric learns that although it can take millions of years to make one crystal, he can make some in just a week with an easy experiment. His new crystals taste good, too.

programme.title: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: Kloe visits her family in Hungary, where she plans to find inspiration for her upcoming solo gala. Meanwhile, Josh and Ellie compete at a higher level for the first time.

programme.title: Super Shape!
programme.desc: Eric learns why the triangle is such an important shape for building. He builds a bridge made of straws that is so strong that he can balance several books on it.

programme.title: Crunchy Crystals
programme.desc: Eric learns that although it can take millions of years to make one crystal, he can make some in just a week with an easy experiment. His new crystals taste good, too.

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: The Mystery of the Curious Coin
programme.desc: Addison and Alex dig up what they think is an Ancient Roman coin in the community garden – then have a mystery to solve when it unexpectedly disappears.

programme.title: Trip to Central African Republic
programme.desc: Zoe is grumpy about babysitting her little sister. Alim suggests Milo take over, but he protests, saying babysitting is a girl's job. Alim takes them to the Central African Republic, where Yamba shows that among the Aka, men care for babies.

programme.title: Trip to Iran
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo offer Alim a snack, but when he refuses, they eat it themselves. Alim protests-he was just being polite! To explain, Alim takes them to Iran to meet Aydin during Nowruz, where they learn about Ta'arof, the custom of refusing three times before accepting.

programme.title: Positive Thoughts Only
programme.desc: DiktaThor finds out he has new telepathic powers. By using his negative thoughts, he can wither Bumble's flowers. Only Sprinter can come and save the day turning DiktaThor's negative thoughts into positive ones.

programme.title: Muffins
programme.desc: Telmo and Tula love cooking muffins and getting help from Grown-up, but they must be patient and careful because muffins will be really hot when they take them out of the oven.

programme.title: San Diego
programme.desc: In sunny San Diego: Beach volleyball lesson with local teens, paragliding at Torrey Pines Glider Port, flow riding at Wavehouse, and Olympic archery lessons. A week of thrilling sports and diverse experiences!

programme.title: Crunchy Crystals
programme.desc: Eric learns that although it can take millions of years to make one crystal, he can make some in just a week with an easy experiment. His new crystals taste good, too.

programme.desc: You'll lava this one. We'll show you how to use a bottle and oil in this make that bubbles and boils.

programme.title: E23 - Deep South Bouillabaisse
programme.desc: Chef Deborah combines French cuisine with deep Southern cooking in her take on bouillabaisse. She starts by making a homemade broth with fish remnants, vegetable scraps, spices and more in a pot.

programme.desc: Rachael prepares a family-friendly, go-to meal of sauteed chicken thighs marinated with chilli crisp, cooked with mango salsa and served with steamed vegetables.

programme.title: E4 - Chicken Gizzard And Poutine
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes a smothered chicken gizzard poutine, which mixes traditional, Southern-fried chicken gizzards with French-Canadian fries, gravy and cheese curds for a decadent global meal.

programme.title: E23 - Deep South Bouillabaisse
programme.desc: Chef Deborah combines French cuisine with deep Southern cooking in her take on bouillabaisse. She starts by making a homemade broth with fish remnants, vegetable scraps, spices and more in a pot.

programme.title: E1 - Iraqi Salmon & Date Brownies
programme.desc: Jake makes two of his favourite super-simple crowd-pleasers. First, Iraqi roast salmon slathered in a caramelised onion and tomato sauce. This main dish is paired with a decadent fudgy date brownie.

programme.title: E64 - Orlando: Campbell House
programme.desc: Duke is BACK and ready to flip more zombies with our expert Zombie flippers, Keith and Alynne. The team checks out a vintage property in a desirable neighbourhood that needs quite an overhaul.

programme.desc: Noyontara talks to ghosts and is mocked for it. Her world flips after marrying Surjo, a man who trusts only science, leading to spooky twists and emotional surprises.

programme.desc: Another portrayal of the same heartfelt love journey, highlighting charm, humor, and the small emotional conflicts that slowly build into meaningful relationships.

programme.desc: Gifted chef Mannat strives for success, unaware her ruthless boss, Aishwarya, is her estranged birth mother, creating a complex and emotional workplace dynamic.

programme.desc: Once an AIPMT topper, Aarambhi's life is now weighed down by marital duties, but deep within her lies a long-lost dream. Will she get a second chance?

programme.desc: Shivaay bravely fights off goons to protect a life-saving injection for Aadhya. Days later, when Aadhya regains consciousness, Baldev is filled with guilt for the harm he caused her.

programme.desc: Glitch takes Tala to the continent of Africa to help her with an Academy project.

programme.title: E40 - How To Be A Supertato
programme.desc: Supertato shows the Grape Kids a Supertato training film, but Evil Pea sneaks in to take over Tato Tower. The Grape Kids use the rug launcher to eject Evil Pea out of the tower.

programme.title: E23 - Wingsuit Yourself
programme.desc: Tao needs help learning to fly his new wingsuit for a big town event, and Mojo and Bo are the experts. Can they help him find his inner bird before it's too late?

programme.title: E41 - Stickbird
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: E40 - Relax
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: E1 - Cool, Man
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programme.title: E42 - Muffin Cone
programme.desc: When Muffin can't stop sucking her thumb, she has to wear a cone of shame. But the cone gets in her way and she can no longer play `sandwich shop' with Bluey and Bingo.

programme.title: E8 - Pockets
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit Patch in the Cloud Kitchen. He has found a tiny mouse in his pocket, which reminds him of a tasty treat recipe to make with the Playtimers - pocket mouse pitta!

programme.title: E14 - The Train Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is playing with his train set. Choo-choo! It's amazing! The squirrels are curious and want to know all about it.

programme.title: E25 - Gliding, Argentina
programme.desc: Glitch gatecrashes an academy gliding test, causing calamity in the skies over Argentina.

programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: E274 - Big Bad Bubble Bass / Sea-Man Sponge Haters Club
programme.desc: Karen tells the fairytale of a nerd trying to steal an action figure from his three little neighbors. // Squidward hosts a secret 'We Hate SpongeBob Club' at his house.

programme.title: E213 - Cleanin' House
programme.desc: While Bunny's in Klopnod, the Star home becomes a mess.

programme.title: E712 - Party Fowl / Sleepless in Royal Woods
programme.desc: When Sergio stays at the Louds, he soon gets into trouble when he doesn't want to hang out with the rest of the pets. // Unable to get Lily to go to sleep, Mom takes her for a drive where they happen to witness a burglary.

programme.title: E210 - Too Many Patricks / Much Tofu About Nothing
programme.desc: Patrick hires other Patricks to entertain at parties. // Pat-Thos shares a Hamdonian tale of love and pork products.

programme.title: E102 - Stair Wars
programme.desc: Patrick and GrandPat try to pass each other on the stairs, leading to a ludicrous conflict.

programme.title: E202 - Summer of Secrets
programme.desc: Chloe must attend summer school, and Max is assigned to be her teacher. While they will be busy all summer, Phoebe decides to go solo on missions. She meets a new superhero named Captain Perfect, and discovers they make a good crime-fighting team.

programme.title: E301 - Hysterical History
programme.desc: On a trip to the museum, SpongeBob and Patrick teach Sandy all about Bikini Bottom's fascinating, yet questionable, history.

programme.title: E206 - Prison Break
programme.desc: When Jack and Lil are grounded by Will and Min, who are then grounded by Halmoni, the family team up to escape their punishment.

programme.title: E245 - King Plankton
programme.desc: Plankton practices ruling the world by shrinking himself down and declaring himself king of SpongeBob's aquarium.

programme.title: E320 - Jeers for Fears
programme.desc: After agreeing to go to The Royal Woods House of Terror, Linc and Clyde have to toughen up and face their fears.

programme.title: E211 - Halmoni Learns the Internet / The Library
programme.desc: Halmoni feels she looks helpless about technology, so she becomes a master hacker and vows to destroy their internet FOREVER! // Lily must retrieve a book from the dreaded library: a horrifying maze of unknown terrors. Can she and Jack escape alive?

programme.title: E211 - Halmoni Learns the Internet / The Library
programme.desc: Halmoni feels she looks helpless about technology, so she becomes a master hacker and vows to destroy their internet FOREVER! // Lily must retrieve a book from the dreaded library: a horrifying maze of unknown terrors. Can she and Jack escape alive?

programme.title: E293 - Big Top Flop / Sandy, Help Us!
programme.desc: When the circus comes to town and steals his customers away, Mr. Krabs tries to sabotage the show. // Sandy spends the day solving everyone's issues, only to return home to her own monster of a problem.

programme.title: E211 - Halmoni Learns the Internet / The Library

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: To Dan-dan, her family was an obstacle. She eventually leaves home and starts working as a resident tutor. And the more time she spends with the kids and their father, Young-guk, the more she falls for him.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.desc: Gourmet celebrities team up to explore the world of convenience stores and share their secret recipes!

programme.desc: Judge Lee Han-young, who regains consciousness after an unjust death, returns to the past to punish the wrongdoers and change his fate.

programme.desc: Park Bo-gum, who holds a national barber's license, and his close friends Lee Sang-yi and Kwak Dong-yeon run a special barbershop in a remote rural village, tending to both hair and hearts.

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

Chandni
programme.desc: Chandni's fiance, Rohit, is paralysed in an accident and she is forced to relocate to Mumbai where her boss, Lalit, falls for her. However, she faces a dilemma when Rohit returns and woos her too. Release Year: 1989 Director: Yash Chopra Awards: Filmfare Awards- Best Cinematographer- Manmohan Singh

programme.title: Duplicate
programme.desc: A criminal and a chef look alike which helps the former to conduct his illegal activities. Release Year: 1998 Director: Mahesh Bhatt

programme.title: Triads The Inside Story
programme.desc: Hung Hing Family boss Lee Qun was ambushed on his way to Macau. His heir Lee Mun-ho flew back from the States for the funeral. Mun-ho, who did not want to mingle with the mobsters, planned to return to the States for good after wrapping up his father's business in Hong Kong. However, through his intelligence and managerial skills, he turned Hung Hing into a well organized business structure. On the other hand, Yeung Kong, a young and ambitious mobster who was brought up under the old Triad tradition, strongly opposed Mun-ho...

programme.title: Hail The Judge
programme.desc: Chau Wah-sing was a muddleheaded minor government official. A son of the Chief Commander raped the beautiful bride. However, Wah-sing was arrested since he wanted to help her...

programme.title: Freedom Run
programme.desc: Te-pei sets up an Angel's Dust scan but finds himself trapped by Hong Kong police led by Chang. They are ordered to cooperate to crack the narcotize ring and suspect rich Chen as the kingpin. This leads to a Yunan martial arts troupe. Chang falls in love with the troupe's star, Hung. Police raid the troupe but find nothing as Hung has unwittingly taken the narcotics. She wants to smuggle herself to America, only to find herself chased by police and traffickers...

programme.title: Aalto
programme.desc: Alvar Aalto is one of Europe's greatest modern architects, focuses on his remarkable and loving partnership with wife, Aino

programme.title: Broken Embraces
programme.desc: A film director falls in love with his lead actress, but a fatal accident took away his sight and his love.

programme.title: The Trouble With You
programme.desc: A widow discovers that her husband sent an innocent man to jail to cover-up his own crimes.

programme.title: Munich: Start-Ups Are Revolutionizing Drone Technology
programme.desc: Munich is emerging as a hub for drone innovation: Bundeswehr University start-ups are building drones that conquer the skies and can also see underground.

programme.title: When Mudslides Threaten Mountain Villages
programme.desc: In the Alps, villages are increasingly threatened by flows of mud and debris. The problem reached new heights in 2025, when the Swiss mountain village of Blatten was nearly completely buried by a huge avalanche.

programme.title: What Motivates Us To Protect Our Environment?
programme.desc: In the Western Ghats, locals are learning that tending forests is profitable. Also: green jobs, environmental storytelling, and a river clean-up in Germany.

programme.title: Homo Plasticus - The Plastic Inside Us
programme.desc: All organisms harbor an invisible, omnipresent enemy: plastic. Researchers worldwide have shown that plastic particles can also be detected in humans - in organs and bodily fluids.

programme.title: Norway At Its Limit - Tourists Flood The North

programme.desc: Viktor Navorski is trapped in John F. Kennedy Airport when he is denied entry into the United States and at the same time cannot return to his native country.

programme.title: The Godfather Part II
programme.desc: This brilliant piece continues the saga of two generations of successive power within the Corleone family. With Al Pacino and Robert De Niro.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity 4
programme.desc: Strange events begin to occur when a woman and her child move into the neighbourhood.

programme.title: Depravity
programme.desc: Three neighbors uncover a hidden fortune in stolen art only to become trapped in a sadistic game of survival set by a suspected serial killer.

programme.title: Idol Sa Kusina
programme.desc: An entertaining and informative cooking program that showcases scrumptious cuisines. Together with the celebrities, the show unfolds topnotch kitchen skills and culinary secrets that will make cooking dishes effortless.

programme.title: Mars Pa More
programme.desc: Offer insightful discussions on the hottest topics, easy home-cooked recipes, family-friendly games, interesting crafts, musical segments, trending challenges on social media, must-visit places, beauty and home tips, and many more.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

E4 - Winter As The Water Flows
programme.desc: The Swiss lakes could not be more different in winter. But what they still have in common with the other seasons is the romantic charm of their landscapes, a beauty that fascinates and awakens the senses.

programme.title: E4 - Winter As The Water Flows
programme.desc: The Swiss lakes could not be more different in winter. But what they still have in common with the other seasons is the romantic charm of their landscapes, a beauty that fascinates and awakens the senses.

programme.title: E47 - Salt Crusted Vegetables Challenge In Salies De Bearn
programme.desc: Alessandra Montagne visits Salies de Bearn, home to one of the saltiest water sources in France. On today's menu: vegetables baked in a salt crust, served with creamy Ossau Iraty cheese, roasted hazelnuts, and Bayonne ham crisps.

programme.title: E4 - Of Wild Waves And Ocean Spray
programme.desc: Pauline Horellou, in Pays Bigouden, and Gaelle de Trescadec, in Cap Sizun, bring time to a standstill as they paint the portrait of the most dramatic waves. They are part of a new community of storm chasers, sharing their photos and enjoying a notable success on social media.

programme.title: E3 - 小木屋重組搭檔
programme.desc: 由黎明、林依晨、魏晨、謝依霖、鄭元暢、盛一倫、朱珠、李小鵬、王濛、潘曉婷、唐曉天、陳楚河共十二位明星和奧運冠軍參加，以輪換搭檔的形式，在全球十二座體育城市展開一系列競技PK。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: E5 - 娘娘團出宮露營
programme.desc: 蔡少芬、陶昕然、斕曦、張曉龍、藍盈瑩、陳思斯、楊九郎時隔13年後首次合體重聚，以全新的面貌組成「煥新團」，從承載無數記憶的《甄嬛傳》拍攝地北京大觀園出發，自北向南，由東向西，前往全國多個寶藏民族文化發源地，通過深度探訪、遊學，體驗各地民俗文化和風土人情，帶著回憶和新的憧憬環遊全國以完成“煥新之旅”。

programme.title: E5 - 娘娘團出宮露營
programme.desc: 蔡少芬、陶昕然、斕曦、張曉龍、藍盈瑩、陳思斯、楊九郎時隔13年後首次合體重聚，以全新的面貌組成「煥新團」，從承載無數記憶的《甄嬛傳》拍攝地北京大觀園出發，自北向南，由東向西，前往全國多個寶藏民族文化發源地，通過深度探訪、遊學，體驗各地民俗文化和風土人情，帶著回憶和新的憧憬環遊全國以完成“煥新之旅”。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 以美食出發，傳遞家鄉的味道，用最質樸的方式製作美食，給海外遊子送去家人的慰藉，傳遞濃濃的思鄉之情。

programme.title: E44
programme.desc: 突破傳統的交友方式，24位單身女生以亮燈和滅燈方式來決定男嘉賓去留，通過「愛之初體驗」、「愛之再判斷」、「愛之終決選」、「男生權利」等決定男女嘉賓的速配成功。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: E2 - 羽泉私人歌單曝光
programme.desc: 全新互動音樂節目，以「星素結合」的形式全民共唱。100位素人歌手將通過現場K歌贏得機會成為三位幸運歌手，與每集的大咖歌手進行合唱挑戰，實現自己的夢想。大咖歌手嘉賓包括孫楠、羽泉等。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: E18 - 澳洲男嘉賓引告白潮
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.title: It's Showtime
programme.desc: 'It's Showtime' is a hit variety program that thrives on spontaneity and animated conversations.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.title: Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre
programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: It features two families who compete to name the most popular answers to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes

programme.title: Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre
programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Family Feud

programme.title: E3 - The Acacia Loop
programme.desc: As the dry season begins, thousands of animals are making their way to the Acacia Loop. Each must establish their place in the pecking order and avoid the dangerous residents who are all too willing to make a meal of the unwary.

programme.title: E5 - Boreal
programme.desc: Travel to the Arctic for a peek at the brutal challenges of life in the boreal forest, then admire some stellar animal adaptations. Witness a secret reindeer superpower, navigate a rodent labyrinth of snow, and learn why moose are gourmets at heart.

programme.title: E6 - Extreme
programme.desc: Learn how plants and animals tough it out in some of the driest terrain Earth has to offer. Run across thirsty trees that act as elephant signposts, see insects team up with plants for a chance at life, and get insight into natural chemical warfare.

programme.title: E1 - The Young Up-Start
programme.desc: Explore the lush treed cityscape where fluffy male Matnoor rules over the 30-member-strong Street Troop with an iron fist. Then meet Aarav, the old alpha who oversees the wilder Hill Troop. Which will up-and-comer Loci challenge for the crown?

programme.title: E2 - The Grass is Greener
programme.desc: Go on a junk-food-fuelled urban holiday with the Street Troop, then watch the Hill Troop’s invasion of their turf turn sour. Monitor the Sisterhood’s plot to kidnap Sara’s baby before newly minted alpha Loci discovers his old rival is back in town.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: E3 - Grazers Browsers
programme.desc: Follow the annual wildebeest migration of the Serengeti, where over one and a half million wildebeest follow an ancient pattern driven by rainfall and fertile soils.

programme.title: Paws-Men
programme.desc: The Paws-Men are Tat Yan, Charlie, Seal, and Keith. When a dog is in need of rescue, the Paws-Men assemble to save the dog immediately like Batman. ”Paws-Men” tells the story of rescuing dogs, in which Paws-Men encounter many difficulties, such as a dog eatery, bullies and a dog abusing granny. Yet Paws-Men witness true friendships between dogs and humans. This film makes us realize: Saving dogs is not hard. People are the real problem.

programme.title: Alienoid
programme.desc: In the year 2022, Guard and Thunder live on Earth, managing alien prisoners who have been locked up in humans' brains. One day, a spacecraft appears in the sky over Seoul, and the police detective Moon witnesses a strange sight...Meanwhile 630 years earlier during the Goryeo Dynasty, the hapless dosa (Korean tao magician) Muruk and Ean, the so-called “The Girl Who Shoots Thunder”, each scramble to outwit each other in pursuit of the mystical Divine Blade, for which a huge reward is being offered. Two sorcerers in search of the Divine Blade's secrets, Madam Black and Mr. Blue, as well as the masked Jajang, also set out on a desperate scramble to obtain the Blade. Meanwhile, a spacecraft emerges from a deep river, emitting light...Those who pursue alien prisoners locked in human bodies in the year 2022, and the sorcerers who pursue the legendary Divine Blade in the year 1391... When the door of time opens, everything becomes entangled!

programme.title: Alienoid: The Return to the Future
programme.desc: Ean has become trapped in the distant past while trying to prevent the escape of alien prisoners who are locked up in the bodies of humans. She eventually locates the Divine Blade, which can open a door through time, and sets off to find Thunder in order to return to the present. Meanwhile Muruk, who helps Ean escape various predicaments, is unnerved when he begins sensing the presence of a strange being in his body. Ean and Muruk are pursued by the so-called Sorcerers of Twin Peaks, Madam Black and Mr. Blue, who suspect that a monster lies within Muruk; by the warrior Nong-pa who hopes that the Divine Blade can restore his lost eyesight; and by the sinister Jajang who seeks the Blade for his own ends. Back in the present, the release of an alien substance haava by an escaped alien prisoner known as the Controller results in the death of thousands of people. Min Gaelin who witnesses this by chance comes to realize that this is only the beginning. With only 48 minutes left bef

programme.title: Coffee or Tea?
programme.desc: This is a youth-comedy version of American Dreams in China (2013). Wei Jinbei (played by Liu Haoran), Peng Xiubing (Peng Yuchang) and Li Shaoqun (Yin Fang) are young men of very different personalities. One had tried many times to find success in e-commerce but had failed on every turn in a big city. The other is a village lad, with nothing on his mind but the chase for success. The third one is consumed by romantic visions of life, divorced entirely from reality. They had separately returned from the city to an antiquated town in Yunnan. Brought together by fate, they decided to launch an e-commerce business together. They might have stumbled upon a great idea, but the state-of-the-art nature of their technological pursuit puts them at odds with the fogeyish ways of the very traditional town. With resolve and sincerity, they managed to win over everyone, entering into the eventful journey of a tech startup, a journey at once earnest, vibrant and surreal!

programme.title: Unfinished Girl
programme.desc: He Wei and Xiao Feng are a perfect couple. One day, her younger sister, Xiao Ke, discovers the man who murdered her parents is He Wei, and she invites him back to her home...

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Meet the mob of ‘street smart’ kangaroos moving into Australia’s capital city and the ecologists following their every move. Over one year we follow mob leader Black Spot and kangaroo mum Madge with her two young joeys – mischievous Sonny and tiny pouch bound Alice. After 15 years of drought, Canberra’s Eastern Grey Kangaroos know that the parks and gardens of Australia’s “bush capital” provide a reliable supply of the juicy grass but learning to be a street-smart urban ‘roo is tough with the kangaroos negotiating busy roads and avoiding cars and dogs. Inevitably their incursion into human habitat causes problems – damage to property and collisions with cars. It’s costing millions and thousands of animals are killed each year. The farmers complain that the ‘roos are eroding farmland and damaging their fences. The ACT Government holds an annual kangaroo cull to reduce animal numbers to “sustainable levels”. Confrontations make international news as the situation arouses passions and pol

programme.title: E5 - Ex-Men: The Origin of Terry
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test a famous scene from X-men. They are attempting to see if you can split a bullet with a Katana sword

programme.title: E3 - Leave No Man Behind
programme.desc: Bear drops the contestants off in the middle of a bay where they must swim to shore and, in their haste, a team is left behind. Once on the shore, they must navigate waterfalls, where an injury takes the group by storm.

programme.title: E2 - Heavy Haulage Mission – Giants on the Move
programme.desc: Transports with difficulties. Whether a nearly 50-metre-long rotor blade or a 75-metre-long, gigantic gearbox with a total weight of 442 tonnes - obstacles lurk everywhere. The transport leads uphill, through narrow turns, past houses right at the edge of the road, over soggy paths and through narrow bridges. It requires the utmost precision and concentration, because mistakes are not allowed to happen here.

programme.title: Hustle & Flow
programme.desc: A pimp-cum-drug-dealer suffering from a mid-life crisis forms a band with his pal to reignite his passion for music.

programme.title: E4 - Using Your Brains to Save the Day!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he uses his brains to save the day! When he overloads the carwash with bubble mix, he gets trapped in a giant bubble & floats away! He has to use all his smarts to find a way back down. Then, when Amber the Ambulance crashes & can't move, there's a big emergency! Buster has to muster up his courage & become a 'Hero Ambulance Bus' to save his best friend Scout from a broken bridge.

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Discovery & Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E5 - Baby Star
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E2 - What Will JJ Learn Today?
programme.desc: What will JJ learn today? Join him for a week of fun as he learns why each day is special. Then, celebrate Valentine's Day with the Melon Patch kids as they show they care with gifts & kind words. The learning continues as Bella helps teach the class the ASL alphabet & Daniela teaches the differences between the English & Spanish ABCs! From visiting a petting zoo to learning about recycling, there's a new lesson every day!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster's Dreams Come to Life!
programme.desc: Join Buster as his amazing dreams come to life! First, he dreams he is a fish, complete with a tail & fins! He's scared when he meets a big shark, but soon learns the shark just wants a friend to play with. Then, it's all stations go as Buster dreams he's a space rocket & blasts off to tour all the planets! The dreams continue as he becomes Sheriff Buster in the wild west & finds a magic spell book that causes all sorts of trouble!

programme.title: E1 - Let's Go Outside & Play with JJ!
programme.desc: Let's go outside & play with JJ! First, JJ & his friends gather all the pillows they can find to build a giant, cozy fort in the backyard. The outdoor fun continues as JJ's family rolls into a campsite for a big family vacation in their cool camper van! Then, join JJ & his grandparents for a fun-filled day at the train park. From taking care of Bingo to having a scavenger hunt at the beach with Cody, there are so many ways to play outside!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Get Curious & Creative!
programme.desc: It's time for Blippi to get curious & creative! A mysterious book appears in the clubhouse, & when Blippi opens it, the brand-new Curiosity Crew jumps out! After helping the crew figure out what they're looking for (popsicles!), Blippi & Meekah join them on some creative adventures. They learn all about how to mix colors to make a beautiful rainbow painting, shrink down to dance with Bendjamin the Klutz & ride a library cart on a hunt for books about dinosaurs!

programme.title: E10 - Sleepy Time with Twinkle
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。
